turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, can you tell me what are the OPD timings at your clinic?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Sure! Our OPD is open Monday to Saturday, 8:30 AM to 8:00 PM. On Sundays we operate from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM for limited specialities.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Oh, you're open on Sundays too. That's convenient. And what about the emergency department?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Our emergency department is open 24 hours, 7 days a week.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Great. One more thing — where exactly are you located? I've seen different addresses online.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Our official address is Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic, Plot 14, Baner Road, near Balewadi Phata, Pune 411045.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Perfect, that's what I needed. Thanks.
